info.name: TCCR Backend — Full API Collection
info.description:
Complete API test collection for TCCR (The Christian Center Rathmalana) backend. Covers all V1 and V2 endpoints across 10 microservices.

Test flow:
1. Run 🔐 Sign In first to populate all tokens
2. Run folders in order (1️⃣ → 📊)
3. Each folder may depend on IDs saved by previous folders

Prerequisites:
- Firebase emulators running: npx firebase emulators:start
- Services running: docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up
- Seeded: node scripts/seed-emulator.js && node scripts/seed-v2-roles.js

exec: pm.test("200 OK — Super Admin Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Admin Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Student 1 (pending) Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Student 2 (approved) Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Leader Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — G12 Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Sign In — New Member (for logout test)

exec: pm.test("200 OK — New Member Sign In", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("204 No Content — Password Reset", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("400 Bad Request — Wrong OTP", () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test("204 No Content — Track Failure", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — Register FCM Token", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — Delete FCM Token", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — Update Preferences", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — Read All", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("200 OK — Leader Search Users", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — G12 Search Users", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("204 No Content — Update Roles", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — g12 promotes to leader", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — g12 promotes to g12", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — leader promotes leader to g12", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("403 — leader cannot grant leader role", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("204 No Content — Delete Admin", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("200 OK — Get My Role Requests", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — List Role Requests", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Get Course Progress", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("200 OK — Admin Course Progress", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("204 No Content — Read All", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
pm.test("204 No Content — Update Preferences", () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

formdata.description: Select a PDF or DOCX file (max 25 MB). This is a multipart/form-data upload.

request.description: Multipart file upload. Select a real PDF/DOCX file in Postman before sending. Max 25 MB. Returns attachment metadata including the attachment ID.
